description_long: This helmet is styled after a classical Roman or Greek design, featuring a prominent red crest running from front to back along the top. The main body of the helmet is a smooth, rounded dome in a bronze or gold color, with a pronounced brow and cheek guards that extend downward. The crest is composed of evenly spaced, rigid segments that fan out, giving it a dramatic and authoritative appearance. The helmet lacks any visible ventilation holes, fasteners, or modern attachments, emphasizing its historical aesthetic. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, suggesting a metallic or high-quality plastic construction. There are no visible logos, graphics, or additional adornments beyond the bold color contrast between the crest and the helmet shell.
description: A bronze or gold classical helmet with a striking red crest, smooth dome, and cheek guards, evoking ancient Roman or Greek styles. The helmet is plain with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red crest running centrally from front to back and the open face area beneath the brow.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length and fan shape of the red crest, as well as the helmet's rounded dome and cheek guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the width of the crest and the symmetrical, rounded back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the crest's structure and the helmet's smooth, contoured profile.
